identity.mission: Build a Dark Cyber-Guardian Intelligence Dashboard for Police
identity.aesthetic: Dark Mode, Neon Accents, Glassmorphism, Cyber-Security

sidebar.style: fixed left-0 h-full border-r border-white/10 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl z-50

buttons.primary: bg-accent text-black font-bold hover:bg-accent/80 transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,242,255,0.4)] rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wider
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-accent/50 text-accent hover:bg-accent/10 transition-all duration-300 rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wider
buttons.alert: bg-alert/10 border border-alert text-alert hover:bg-alert/20 transition-all duration-300 rounded-sm shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,49,49,0.2)]

cards.base: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-lg overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 hover:border-accent/30 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,242,255,0.1)]
cards.glass: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-lg rounded-xl
cards.interactive: group relative overflow-hidden bg-gradient-to-br from-white/5 to-transparent border border-white/10 hover:border-accent/50 transition-all duration-500

inputs.base: bg-black/20 border border-white/10 focus:border-accent focus:ring-1 focus:ring-accent/50 rounded-md py-2 px-4 text-white placeholder:text-white/30 transition-all
inputs.file_upload: border-2 border-dashed border-white/20 hover:border-accent/50 bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 transition-all rounded-xl p-8 text-center cursor-pointer

hero_background.usage: Login Page Background, Dashboard Hero Overlay

universal_guidelines: Always use 'Rajdhani' font for headings to maintain the cyber-guardian aesthetic.
Use 'Lucide-React' icons with a stroke width of 1.5px for a clean look.
Implement a 'Glassmorphism' effect for all major containers (bg-black/40 + backdrop-blur).
Use the neon cyan (#00F2FF) sparingly for high-priority actions and active states.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast against dark backgrounds (Text-White or Text-Slate-300).
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for testing.
Do NOT use rounded-full buttons; prefer sharp or slightly rounded (rounded-sm/md) for authoritative feel.
All forms must have validation feedback (Red border + Error message).
Use 'Sonner' for toast notifications, styled with dark background and neon borders.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible neon cyan ring on focus.

instructions_to_main_agent: Update 'tailwind.config.js' to include the custom colors and font families.
Create a 'Layout' component that handles the Sidebar and Topbar structure.
Use the provided image URLs for the respective sections.
Follow the 'Bento Grid' layout for the Dashboard home.
